Hero.title: Hey, I'm Lenny.
Hero.text: A 16-year-old passionate about entrepreneurship and technology. Welcome to my personal website where I share my projects, journey, and reflections.

About.title: About me
About.text: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Phasellus scelerisque pretium mauris, quis tristique tortor rhoncus id. Interdum et malesuada fames ac ante ipsum primis in faucibus.

Contact.title: Contact me
Contact.text: You have a project in mind or you just want to discuss? Don't hesitate to contact me!

faq1.question: What types of projects do you work on?
faq1.answer: I work on a variety of projects, from web development to content creation, passing through entrepreneurship. I am always looking for new ideas and challenges to tackle.

faq2.question: Are you open to collaborations?
faq2.answer: Absolutely! I am always interested in collaborating with other technology and entrepreneurship enthusiasts. Don't hesitate to contact me if you have a project idea or if you just want to discuss.

faq3.question: How can I contact you?
faq3.answer: You can contact me by email at contact@lennytc.me

faq4.question: What is your workflow?
faq4.answer: My workflow starts with a phase of understanding the project and the client's needs. Then, I create a detailed plan and start the development. Once the project is completed, I test it and deliver it to the client.

Metadata.title: Projects
Metadata.description: Discover all projects by Lenny TESTU--CHARPENTIER

Now.title: And today ?
Now.text: Today, I've gained a lot of maturity and learned a lot of things. I am currently working on several exciting projects and learning new skills.

values.name: Passion
values.description: I am passionate about technology and entrepreneurship, and I fully invest in everything I do.

values.name: Continuous Learning
values.description: I believe in the importance of constantly learning and developing to achieve my goals.

values.name: Simplicity
values.description: I like clear and efficient things, and I go straight to the point.
